sglang.title: Fix RAG nb, parea setup (parea -> parea-ai)
sglang.author: fpreiss
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The current notebook installs the wrong library for parea.
pip install parea points to https://pypi.org/project/parea/
The intended library (https://github.com/parea-ai/parea-sdk-py) should probably be installed with:
pip install parea-ai

sglang.title: [Minor] Correct Optional type hints in api
sglang.author: fpreiss
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

sglang.author: Qubitium

sglang.title: Decode Incrementally
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?

Use decode incrementally like vLLM and TGI when there is a jump-forward.
Also removed the special judge for whether there is a leading space.
Align with outlines, using byte-level FSM, supporting UTF-8 characters such as Chinese when using regex and jump-forward.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix `MultiprocessingGPUExecutor.check_health` when world_size == 1
vllm.author: jsato8094
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MultiprocessingGPUExecutor and MultiprocessingGPUExecutorAsync do not have the worker_monitor attribute when world_size == 1. However, the check_health() method requires this attribute, so it should be ignored in this case.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Customizable RoPE theta
vllm.author: sasha0552
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changing the RoPE theta in some cases improves the performance of the scaled model. Since we already have an argument for RoPE scaling, it is a good idea to have an argument for RoPE theta as well.

Source

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] add same-node detection
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a function to detect if all processes inside a process group lives in the same node. It should take over #4903 .
The idea is to test if all processes can access the same part of shared memory.
Our CI can only run in the same node now. I manually tested the correctness for multi-node. In

Resolves #4955
